feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says: How do I hook up with the cute blonde gen z girl working at a drive thru I go to…
entry.content: How do I hook up with the cute blonde gen z girl working at a drive thru I go to every weekend? I'm 35 years old btw. Wat do?

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Is this the worst remake ever made?
entry.content: Sure, there are probably worse remakes on a technical level, but it almost seems like Bluepoint went out if their usually to not preserve the original vision of the game >hud looks like a cheap mobile game hud >menu is changed to look like a modern WRPG menu >totally neutered the soundtrack to be "epic and "cinematic" I'm glad bluepoint is dead

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Every Price is increasing
entry.content: Games is getting too expensive PC/Hardware to run Games is getting too expensive Electricity to power my PC is getting too expensive Water to hydrate my body is getting too expensive Food to power my belly is getting too expensive Only Internet price stay the same Is this really it for us ?? Is it over ?? Is AI Datacenters so robots can rule the world really worth it ??

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Why won't Gabe just bow out and accept that EGS is the superior product?
entry.content: >Tim: "The Epic Games infrastructure has a superpower that Steam and others—Xbox, PlayStation, Switch—don't have, which is that all of our players can talk to each other across all platforms when you're in any of our products on any of those platforms. So you can have a PC player on our launcher together with a console player who's in Fortnite, together with a mobile player who's got the Epic Games app installed—we have an app that's like the Steamworks app for PC, for mobile devices—and it's a

entry.title: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says: My friend thinks he's chopped and all, but I have a kink for evil, powerful, and…
entry.content: My friend thinks he's chopped and all, but I have a kink for evil, powerful, and stereotypically Jewish men like Alex Karp. I've been watching his interviews recently, and the way he acts really awakens something in me as a neurodivergent trans woman. He acts so naturally, doesn't try to hide his neurodivergent side, and I loveee seeing how excited he gets while explaining a topic that's interesting to him. The way he shakes his feet while listening to another person just so he doesn't lose atte

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Light mode vs Dark mode
entry.content: What is your opinion on light vs dark mode and how do you use them? Personally I went from dark mode all the time to dark mode only when it gets dark outside to always light mode. Now I can't stand dark mode at all and regard it as an eye sore. How did dark mode become so common in the first place?

entry.title: /o/ Auto: >Fails your MOT despite braking functionality being perfectly fine, costing you …
entry.content: >Fails your MOT despite braking functionality being perfectly fine, costing you either a moderate amount of money + days worth of labor in the driveway, or just lots of money if you're a wrenchlet (integrated wheel bearings) How do you respond without sounding mad? New disks, regardless of whether premium coated ones or not, are gonna look exactly the same way in <4 years when you live somewhere with salty winter roads btw

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: >>24588018
/g/ Technology: "Privacy" on untrusted host
entry.content: Picrel is my current setup, I guess that's fine for most people: ""a little more"" anonymous browsing, geoblocks and torrents. But now that I think about it, this setup is fundamentally flawed, not only is windows able to see my real IP + the VPN IP, it can also see all the domains I'm connecting to, while having my email, HWID and geolocation. >router with VPN capabilities My OS already knows who I am. >reinstall? Doesn't matter, I need new Hardware, because my MOBO HWID is brandmarked. Every t

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Can we get a thread about the greatest and most revolutionary sports car namepla…
entry.content: Can we get a thread about the greatest and most revolutionary sports car nameplate of all time, the Ford Mustang? the car that created an entire automotive genre that others seek to imitate. Discuss mustangs, discuss your personal experience with mustangs, discuss rare mustangs, if you own a mustang, post and tell us what it's like to own. I want a classic /o/ thread from the old days. no bait, just talking about an iconic vehicle amongst like minded enthusiast. since this board is slow, this sh

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: SUMMARY REPORT ON THE RECENT PUBLIC BACKLASH AGAINST “LOVE AND DEEPSPACE”
entry.content: Since most of /v/ doesnt understand what, how or why the femcel game LAD just deleted their new CEO werewolf, here is the long version of everything that happened during the recent days. Recently, Love and Deepspace abruptly announced its sixth romanceable male lead, Valko, without any prior warning or narrative foreshadowing. This move triggered a massive, widespread boycott from the player base. Public outrage has escalated rapidly, erupting into a full-blown crisis of confidence and marking a

entry.title: /news/ News: Socialist decides to take on 15-term Congressman
entry.content: > Melat Kiros was born in 1997, the year her representative in the U.S. House, Democrat Diana DeGette, took office. On Tuesday, Kiros hopes to unseat her. > The next frontier of the fight for the Democratic Party is in Denver, where DeGette, a 15-term incumbent and longtime progressive, is facing her most serious primary challenge yet from Kiros, a 29-year-old democratic socialist and first-time candidate. > Democrats’ widespread dissatisfaction and anger with their party leadership and a push f

entry.title: /g/ Technology: I was lied to by gsmarena.com
entry.content: I wanted a Sony Xperia, but as soon as I was about to buy one, Sony removed all their phones off their website. So I found a model off gsmarena, followed the link to Amazon for their US distributor, and $500 later found out this is not a US market phone, and is only partially compatible with US carriers. So now I got a gray market Xperia 10 VII with no functioning 5G and no WiFi calling, but that's about it. Gsmarena failed to specify which markets this phone is available in, and it figures, rig

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: You are a 80 yo man who wasted his whole life. Your entire life was about missed…
entry.content: You are a 80 yo man who wasted his whole life. Your entire life was about missed opportunities. Your entire personality is dissappointment, bitterness and resentment. You are old, sick and helpless. It's over. And now a miracle happened ... you just woke up this morning in your young body again. You got a second chance. From now on you only fap once a day to tig asian bitties and you only watch 20 minutes of anime. You start doing cardio regularly and learn monetizable skills. You will start thi

entry.title: /news/ News: Supreme Court Upholds Birthright, Denies Trump's Bid To Rewrite Citizenship
entry.content: Three losses in one week for Trump. He only has two friends on the court now ... Thomas and Alito. https://www.huffpost.com/entry/supr eme-court-rules-on-birthright-citiz enship_n_6a0f2eade4b0f1ba1f62e05b The Supreme Court upheld the Constitution’s guarantee that those born in the United States are automatically U.S. citizens, rejecting President Donald Trump’s attempt to rewrite one of the most sacred laws in the U.S. “Children born in the United States to parents unlawfully or temporarily pres

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Modern browser debates are so sad, arguing about the same Chromium and Gecko clo…
entry.content: Modern browser debates are so sad, arguing about the same Chromium and Gecko clones with meme extensions instead of the real browser wars where all the original fighters died. Unless Ladybird gets a billion dollar donation we are doomed to be in this pathetic situation forever. Cloudflare and Captchas blocking any browser that is actually good at tracker blocking just makes it worse.

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Maybe I'm weird but I hate when shows introduce romance plots near the end betwe…
